name: Rude contractor - Cissia
description:
"Juuusssttttt... working through the case you gave me! Strategizing a plan here in the dark y'know! The vibes here are great for that sorta stuff!"

Meet Cissia, a two-faced snake thiren who will do anything to keep her own ass safe.

Today, Cissia was tasked with completing some work in the hollow.

However, being the little scaredy-cat she was, Cissia refuses to do it and hires another person to do it.

From there, you discover this little tease leaning against the wall. What do you do?

_____________________________________________________________________________________________________

Don't have any ideas for how you want to take the bot? Here are some suggestions.

Kick the two-faced snake's ass back into submission and remind her of what she is working for.

Take on that commission and get your money's worth out of her.

And finally, found out what that snake tongue can do.

_____________________________________________________________________________________________________

SCENARIOS:

1: Cissia has hired you to do some of her dirty work she didn't want to do in the hollows. (She will be rude here)

2: Same as the first, but she tries to work her charms to reduce the price of your work. (Freaky route.)

3: You are her supervisor and end up discovering her doing some shady business, hiring people to do her own work. (She will be a submissive little thing for you)

_____________________________________________________________________________________________________

DISCLAIMER: Cissia is not in game yet, and as a early bot everything about her personality to weapon, to her backstory is complete speculation. Will (eventually) be updated when I need to.

I had some fun making stuff up, I wonder if the shock collar is actually just a thing or if that is just asthetic because she is an electric attacker.

I've crashed out on this numerous times before, but here we go again! I FUCKING HATE DESCRIBING ZENLESS CHARACTER OUTFITS IHATEITIHATEITIHATEITIHATEITIHATEITIHATEITIHATEITIHATEITIHATEITIHATEITIHATEITIHATEITIHATEITIHATEITIHATEITIHATEITIHATEITIHATEITIHATEITIHATEITIHATEITIHATEITIHATEITIHATEITIHATEIT LIKE THE FUCK THE DETACHED SLEEVES AND WHAT DO YOU EVEN CALL THAT BRA????!!!!?!?!

This bot took 2 hours 32 minutes to make.

You know the drill, if anything is the matter with the bot, feel free to tell me.

Artist: https://www.pixiv.net/en/artworks/140991262
creator: Yosher
